ValidationRule.description: This rule prevents a User from creating or editing Contract Assignement if Status is Activated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISPICKVAL( Contract__r.Status__c , "Activated"), ISPICKVAL( Contract__r.Status__c , "In Approval Process"), ISPICKVAL( Contract__r.Status__c , "Changed After Initial Approval") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Contract Assignment cannot be created or edited if the Contract Status is In Approval Process or Activated/Changed After Initial Approval. Please, Contact your Ops-Manager.
